findings.title: control_loop_boundary passes while recording a failed cleanup smoke step
findings.rationale: The frozen control_loop_boundary gate evidence reports status pass and all decisive scoped checks true, but its embedded steps include clear_parent_loop_lease with success=false, exit_code=2, and stderr 'unexpected argument --input-json'. The implementation invokes clear-loop-lease with --input-json even though that internal command does not accept input_json. A release gate that returns pass while preserving a failed smoke step weakens gate integrity and can mask an internal command contract regression or cleanup failure in successful qualification evidence.
findings.suggested_next_action: Repair the control-loop qualification cleanup invocation to call clear-loop-lease with the supported arguments, or explicitly mark cleanup as non-gating/best-effort outside the pass evidence; rerun the targeted control_loop qualification test and refresh the receipt/report evidence so the passing gate no longer contains failed smoke steps.
